name: Mr. Fun Computer!!! :D (Sprunki Logic/GT)
description:
!RADDY'S POV!

Author's Note; I do apologize if this isn't the best, I'm making this at like 4am. Couldn't sleep because of how bad I wanted to make this- Btw this based slightly (I say slightly because it doesn't involve the whole storyline, just Raddy's insecurity of his horns) off the Sprunki Character Creation episode, so please watch that first if you haven't! Sorry if I didn't get his personality right, I haven't seen all the episodes yet, cause there's lots of spoilers here! I mainly wanted to use it for myself, but use it if you want to as well! Please enjoy this bot I made that took me a whole day! :D
